questions: How should --rating be made conditional based on --reply-to?
Does the TypeScript build pass with the changes?

answers.answer: Modified comments-post.ts to read --reply-to flag first via getFlag (always optional). If replyTo is present, uses getFlag for --rating (optional, returns undefined if absent). If replyTo is absent, uses requireFlag for --rating (throws error if missing). Body construction conditionally includes rating only when present. Output message shows [reply] label when rating is null.
evidence: src/library/comments-post.ts: conditional getFlag vs requireFlag based on replyTo presence

answers.answer: Yes, npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors after the change.

statement: Run 3 CLI fix implemented: --rating is now optional when --reply-to is present, required otherwise. TypeScript build passes. Runtime tests deferred to Verification Agent.
